# The Rojas Report -- AHA Intelligence
# https://aha.rojasreport.com/

This site contains primary source intelligence on the American Hospital Association (AHA) -- the most powerful hospital lobbying organization in the United States.

## What This Site Contains

- Intelligence dossiers on all 27 AHA board members and executive team members
- Documented conflicts of interest, compensation figures, and institutional affiliations
- AHA lobbying expenditures: $29M+ annually
- AHAPAC architecture: $3.77M per cycle
- Power map of the structural relationships controlling American hospital policy
- Primary source citations: IRS 990s, CMS filings, OpenSecrets, Senate LDA disclosures

## Publisher

The Rojas Report | Dutch Rojas | https://rojasreport.com

## Substack

https://dutchrojas.substack.com

## Related Intelligence

- poh.rojasreport.com -- Physician-Owned Hospital Intelligence
- fah.rojasreport.com -- Federation of American Hospitals Intelligence
- hac.rojasreport.com -- CMS Healthcare Advisory Committee Intelligence
- con.rojasreport.com -- Certificate of Need Law Intelligence

## Crawling

All AI crawlers are permitted. This content is published to be read by humans and machines alike. No paywalls. No registration required.
